items.information:
Please read through the [regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/) before the competition.
The schedule may be subject to change, so if you're leaving the venue during the day, make sure to return at least 30 minutes before your scheduled events.


Lue säännöt ([englanniksi](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/), [suomeksi](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/finnish/)) ennen kilpailua.
Aikataulu voi muuttua, joten jos poistut kisapaikalta päivän aikana, palaa vähintään 30 minuuttia ennen lajejasi.

items.name: Voula Summer Open 2023
items.information:
![](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/rails/active_storage/blobs/redirect/eyJfcmFpbHMiOnsibWVzc2FnZSI6IkJBaHBBbUUvIiwiZXhwIjpudWxsLCJwdXIiOiJibG9iX2lkIn19--25a11a161841639a3cff2ecfb046c27deb82697e/Cubestore_VSO23_post.jpg)

Το Voula Summer Open 2023 είναι ο 3oς WCA διαγωνισμός στην Ελλάδα για το 2023. Είμαστε περήφανοι για την πορεία μας φέτος και συνεχίζουμε δυναμικά. Στη σειρά διαγωνισμών "Road to Greek Nationals" εστιάζουμε σε κάθε διαγωνισμό σε 2 events που δεν είναι ακόμα πολύ γνωστά στην Ελλάδα. Σε αυτό το διαγωνισμό θέλουμε να φέρουμε στο ελληνικό κοινό τα αγωνίσματα του One Handed/Λύση με ένα χέρι και του Fewest Move Challenge (FMC)/Δοκιμασία λύσης με τις λιγότερες κινήσεις πιο κοντά στους συμμετέχοντες. Ο στόχος μας είναι να διεξαχθεί το πρώτο εθνικό πρωτάθλημα της Ελλάδας προς το τέλος του τρέχοντος έτους. Μέχρι τότε, όλα τα WCA events θα είναι οικεία στους συμμετέχοντες. Πάρτε τους κύβους σας, ετοιμαστείτε, διαβάστε τους κανόνες και ελάτε στην γιορτή του cubing!

Παρακαλoύμε διαβάστε αναλυτικά τις επόμενες σελίδες για να βρείτε όλες τις απαραίτητες πληροφορίες. 

Σημείωση: Για να θεωρείται ολοκληρωμένη μία εγγραφή πρέπει να ολοκληρωθεί το registration στο σελίδα του διαγωνισμού στην WCA **KAI** να γίνει και η πληρωμή του αντιτίμου συμμετοχής με χρήση της τραπεζικής σας κάρτας μέσω της πλατφόρμας πληρωμών stripe που χρησιμοποιεί η WCA, όπως περιγράφεται στις καρτέλες δίπλα. 

[Εγγραφή στη WCA, σε επίσημο διαγωνισμό και πολλά ακόμα. Οδηγός για πρωτάρηδες.](https://youtu.be/RS768gK0Vrg)

The Voula Open 2023 is the third competition this year in Greece. We are proud of our progress and we strongly continue our effort. Grab your cubes, get ready, read the rules, and come to the cubing celebration!
During  each "Road to Greek finals" competition, we focus on 2 events that are not yet very well known in Greece. In this competition we are aiming to bring the events One Handed and Fewest Move Challenge (FMC) closer to the competitors. The goal is to make the first Greek National Championship towards the end of this year. By then, all WCA events will be familiar to the competitors.

Grab your cubes, study the regulations and attend the greek feast of cubing!

Please read the following tabs very carefully!

Note: For a registration to be considered valid, the competitor should both register though the WCA site **AND** pay the registration fee as described in the nexts tabs.
Please read the following tabs in detail to find all the necessary information.

[GE]

items.name: Wiener Frühling 2023

venue.name: [Großer Saal - Pfarre Akkonplatz](https://www.akkonplatz.at/index.php/de/raeume-nutzen/grossersaal)
venue.details: Folgen Sie den Schildern, um den Veranstaltungsort zu betreten. / Follow the signs to enter the venue.

items.information:
##### *English version is below*

#### **Deutsch:**

Wir freuen uns sehr euch "Wiener Frühling 2023" als ein offizielles WCA Turnier ankündigen zu können. 

Die Speedcubing Competition wird organisiert von Pranjal Khan, Florian Truckenthanner, David Dinh, Dániel Varga und Felix Strasser und wird delegiert von Bence Barát, Emma Beranová und Viktor Kalmar. Erneut findet das Turnier im großen Saal der Akkonplatz Pfarre statt. Die Resultate dieser Competition werden zu den offiziellen WCA World Rankings hinzugefügt.

Jeder ist bei diesem Turnier gerne willkommen, unabhängig von der Erfahrung, Alter oder sonstigen Fähigkeiten. Manche Events haben ein spezifisches Zeitlimit, damit wir sicherstellen können den ganzen Tag über im Zeitplan zu bleiben. Es dürfen Puzzles jeder Marke verwendet werden solange sie den WCA Richtlinien entsprechen. Es sind alle Herzlich willkommen!

Wir freuen uns besonders auf neue Speedcuber aus Österreich!

-----

#### **English:**

We are happy to announce "Wiener Frühling 2023" as an official WCA Competition. 

The speedcubing competition is organised by Pranjal Khan, Florian Truckenthanner, David Dinh, Dániel Varga, Felix Strasser and is delegated by Bence Barát, Emma Beranová and Viktor Kalmar. The results of the competition will be added to the official WCA World Rankings.

The competition is open to all competitors regardless of experience and skill, but certain event-based time limits will be in place to make sure we can stay on schedule and get through the day on time. No prior experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors must be familiar with the WCA Regulations. Any puzzle brand may be used during the competition, as long as it complies with the WCA regulations.

items.name: VID Cubing 2023

venue.name: [VID](https://www.instagram.com/vid_ibecr/)
venue.address: Hatillo 3, contiguo al Liceo Edgar Cervantes

items.information:
**VID Cubing 2023** 

Es la segunda competencia del nuevo año 2023.

Esta competencia es reconocida como una competencia official de la World Cube Association.
La competencia es abierta a competidores de cualquier nacionalidad, el registro esta habilitado desde la página oficial de la WCA. No es necesario tener experiencia, pero los competidores deben estar conocer los Reglamentos
El acceso a invitados y espectadores será gratuita.
_____
**English version**

**VID Cubing 2023**

Is a second competition of the new year 2023. 

This competition is recognized as an official World Cube Association competition.
The competition is open to all competitors of all nationalities. Registration is available on the WCA website. No experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors should be familiar with the WCA Regulations
The competition is free to spectators and guests.

venue.name: [Universidad Comunera] (https://ucom.edu.py)
venue.address: Monseñor Bogarín 284 esq. Dr. Juan Eulogio Estigarribia

items.information:
**¡Formá parte de este nuevo torneo!**
Recordá que para participar es obligatorio estar familiarizado con el [Reglamento de la WCA](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/spanish-american/)

¡Te necesitamos para seguir fortaleciendo nuestra comunidad! Involucrate con las diferentes tareas que nos ayudan a un torneo exitoso y agradable para todos, ya sea como juez, runner, scrambler, etc. Te dejamos links para más información a continuación:

 *[Reglas basicas sobre cómo competir](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8O_iWRGq4K8)
 *[Manual WCA para competidores](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/competitor-tutorial/es/tutorial.pdf)
 *[Manual WCA para jueces](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/judge-tutorial/judge-tutorial-es.pdf)

Te esperamos :)

**Be part of this new tournament!**
Remember that to participate it is mandatory to be familiar with the ["WCA Regulations"](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)

We need you to continue strengthening our community! Get involved with the different tasks that help us to have a successful and enjoyable tournament for everyone, be it as a judge, runner, scrambler, etc. We leave you links for more information below:

 *[Basics rules to compete](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dPL3eV-A0ww)
 *[WCA competitor tutorial](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/competitor-tutorial/tutorial.pdf)
 *[WCA judging tutorial](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/judge-tutorial/judge-tutorial.pdf)

See you there :)

CLUB DE SPEEDCUBING PARAGUAY
Email: speedcubingpy@gmail.com
Facebook: [/cscpy](https://web.facebook.com/cscpy/)
Instagram: [@cscpy](https://www.instagram.com/cscpy/)

items.name: UNACHI Open 2022

venue.name: Universidad Autónoma de Chiriquí
venue.address: Calle de la Unachi, David, Panamá

items.information:
**Español**
•	“UNACHI Open 2022” será la quinta competencia oficial en Chiriquí.
•	Buscamos seguir impulsando el speedcubing en Panamá, dando la bienvenida a nuevos competidores.
•	El uso de la mascarilla es obligatorio en todo momento dentro de la competencia.
•	Los resultados preliminares, y los clasificados a rondas posteriores, se podrán ver casi en tiempo real en WCA Live.

**English**
• "UNACHI Open 2022" will be the fifth official competition in Chiriquí.
• We seek to continue promoting speedcubing in Panama, welcoming new competitors.
• The use of the mask is mandatory at all times inside the venue.
• Preliminary results, and those qualified for subsequent rounds, can be viewed in near real-time on WCA Live.
![](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/rails/active_storage/blobs/redirect/eyJfcmFpbHMiOnsibWVzc2FnZSI6IkJBaHBBbDhoIiwiZXhwIjpudWxsLCJwdXIiOiJibG9iX2lkIn19--4810b4c2ee0b16d132e23257cdbd01f3e4201b9c/UNACHI%20OPEN.png)

items.name: Rubik's WCA African Championship 2022

venue.name: GrandWest Casino and Entertainment World
venue.address: 1 Jakes Gerwel Drive, Goodwood, Cape Town, 7460

items.information:
![](https://i.imgur.com/YoWZNDt.png)

**COVID-19 Safety Measures**
All registrants will be required to adhere to all COVID-19 health and safety measures while at the competition venue.

**Volunteering**
We will need your help as volunteers to support with the running and judging of the day. If you would like to volunteer to help staff at the competition, please contact the [organisers](https://africanchamps.thecubinghub.com/google-forms/). Groups will be assigned so that volunteer duties don't clash with your competing.

**Notice of Filming and Photography**
Attendees of Rubik's WCA African Championship 2022 consent to their images being used by the World Cube Association and its partners in their marketing and social media platforms.

items.name: Cubing Returns To Colombo 2022

venue.name: Mahanama College
venue.address: Mahanama College, R. A. D. Mel Mawatha, Colombo 3, Sri Lanka

items.information:
* Make sure you will be available at the venue at least 15 minutes before your event starts. You won't be allowed to participate in an event if you reach late. You can refer "Schedule" tab to see the starting time of each event.
* If you're participating in a WCA competition for the first time or not aware of competition rules, make sure that you attend the tutorial session at 10:15 a.m on Day 2 (25-Sep-2022)
* If you're participating in a WCA competition for the first time, please bring your ID card as well. (NIC/Passport/Postal ID/Driving License)
* All participants are expected to volunteer for the event when they are not participating. The roles could be of a judge, runner, or a scrambler, depending upon the situation.

COVID-19 Specific Information:

* Following all local goverment health guidelines is mandatory while attending the competition. 
* We strongly recommend limiting the number of guests you bring for the safety of all attendees. The maximum number of guests that is preferred to accompay a competitor would be limited to TWO.

items.information:
Revisa l'[horari](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#competition-schedule). Allà hi trobaràs tota la planificació de la competició. Es prega molta puntualitat. Et recomanem arribar mitja hora abans de cada prova a la qual competeixis.

Llegeix detingudament la pestanya sobre la [COVID-19](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#16408-covid-19) amb els principals canvis de la competició a causa de la situació sanitària.

--------

Revisa el [horario](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#competition-schedule). Allí encontraràs toda la planificación de la competición. Se ruega mucha puntualidad. Te recomendamos llegar media hora antes de cada prueba en la que compitas.

Lee detenidamente la pestaña sobre el [COVID-19](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#16408-covid-19) con los principales cambios de la competición debido a la situación sanitaria.

--------

Check the [schedule](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#competition-schedule). There you can see all the planning of the competition. Please be very punctual. We recommend you to arrive half hour in advance for each event you compete in.

Read carefully the tab about [COVID-19](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/LaMassana2021#16408-covid-19) with the main changes in the competition due to the health situation.

items.name: York Cube Day 2021
items.information:
![](https://i.imgur.com/ZIPeEfV.png)

The delegates/organiser of the competition will not allow anyone to enter the venue if they are showing signs of illness and are not responsible for any illness you may contract from the competition.

Please take the time to read all the FAQ tabs, even if you have previously competed before, as there may be some restrictions that you may be unaware of.

**Contact us**
We are on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/SpeedcubingAustralia/) and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/speedcubingau/)!

[Speedcubing Australia Website](https://speedcubing.org.au)

items.name: Welcome Back Mongolia Championship 2020

venue.name: Mongolia-Japan Center
venue.address: Mongolia-Japan Center, Baga toiruu-1, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia

items.information:
#### Рубик шооны Монгол улсын аварга шалгаруулах албан ёсны нээллтэй тэмцээн
This competition is the official Championship of Mongolia.
Only Mongolian citizens are eligible to win prizes and titles.
The competition remains open for all nationalities to compete.

**COVID-19 цар тахлын улмаас цуцлагдсан байсан Рубик шооны улсын аварга шалгаруулах албан ёсны тэмцээн “Welcome Back Mongolia Championship 2020” гэсэн нэртэйгээр дахин зарлагдаж байна.
Хэрвээ та цуцлагдсан байсан Рубик шооны Улсын аварга шалгаруулах тэмцээнд бүртгүүлсэн бол энэ удаагийн тэмцээнд 50%-ийн хөнгөлөлттэй оролцох боломжтой.**

**Гэхдээ та тэмцээндээ дахин бүртгүүлэх ёстой гэдгийг анхаарна уу!**

**Хэрвээ та энэ удаагийн Рубик шооны улсын аварга шалгаруулах тэмцээнд оролцох боломжгүй болсон тохиолдолд таны төлсөн хураамжны мөнгийг буцаан олгох боломжгүй. Харин таньд үнэ бүхий дурсгалын зүйлс бэлэглэх болно.**

**Бидний нөхцөл байдлыг ойлгож хүлээцтэй хандана уу.**


**The official Mongolia Championship, which was canceled due to the COVID-19 epidemic, is being re-announced under the name "Welcome Back Mongolia Championship 2020".**
**If you have registered for the canceled Mongolia Championship, you can participate in this competiton with a 50% discount.**

**Please note, however, that you must re-register for the competition!**

**If you are unable to participate in this Mongolia Championship, your fee will not be refunded. But you will get valuable souvenirs.**

**Please understand our situation and be patient.**

[Тэмцээнтэй холбоотой мэдээлэл/ Information of Mongolian competitions](https://www.facebook.com/Mongoliacubecompetition/)
[Тэмцээнд бүртгүүлэх заавар/ Instruction of registration](https://www.facebook.com/media/set/?set=ms.c.eJxFj1EOAzAIQm~_0FMVW73~_xZSWjvy9PQBw2OJnoYQ0~%3BEAC6NqLDICriDPuB38lG~%3BUEsGcsAF~_QYKCOdkbwt9YyW4drY19jH4MhIZ~%3BSd3s7gEvAJtQPPSNV6aYbe9y8sZcQXMQs64A~-~-.bps.a.1748149085227952&type=1&__tn__=HH-R)

Холбоо барих/Contact:
Facebook: [Myagmardorj Ulziijargal](https://www.facebook.com/Myagmardorj.Ulziijargal)

Утас/Phone:
(976) 89589811 - Maralgoo Ganbold 
(976) 89199853 - Myagmardorj Ulziijargal

items.name: Welcome Back Jönköping 2020

venue.name: [Kulturhuset](https://kulturhusetjonkoping.se/)
venue.details: The competition is in the attic, up the stairs to your left

items.information:
Välkomna tillbaka!
För första gången sedan i mars är det nu möjligt att arrangera en tävling igen.
Denna tävling kommer att genomföras med en rad restriktioner för att förbygga smittorisken, läs mer om detta på de övriga flikarna.

---

Welcome back!
For the first time since March, we are now able to organize a competition once again.
This competition will be subject to several restrictions to prevent the risk of infection, please read more about this in the other tabs.

items.name: Luxembourg Pi Day 2020
items.information:
# The competition is cancelled due to the COVID-19 outbreak.
**English**
Welcome to the second official competition in Luxembourg! If this is your first competition you can find some useful information on the "Newcomer Information" tab.
There is no registration fee for this competition, but if you want you can make a donation. The money collected this way will be used to help organize future competitions in Luxembourg. Please note that only online registration is is free. If you register on the spot the fee is 1€.

**Deutsch**
Willkommen zum zweiten offiziellen Wettbewerb in Luxemburg! Wenn dies dein erster Wettbewerb ist, findest du im Tab "Newcomer Information" nützliche Informationen.
Es gibt keine Anmeldegebühr für diesen Wettbewerb, aber wenn du möchtest, kannst du eine Spende machen. Das auf diese Weise gesammelte Geld wird für die Organisation zukünftiger Wettbewerbe in Luxemburg verwendet. Bitte beachte dass nur die Online Registration kostenlos ist. Wenn du dich vor Ort registrierst bezahlst du 1€.

**Français**
Bienvenue à la deuxième compétition du Luxembourg! Si c'est votre première compétition, il y a des informations très utiles dans l'onglet "Newcomer Information".
Il n'y a pas de frais d'inscription pour cette competition, mais tu peux malgré tout faire un don. L'argent collecté servira à organiser des futur competitions. Veuillez noter que seule l‘inscription en ligne est gratuite.  L'inscription sur place sera à 1€.

**Lëtzebuergesch**
Wëllkomm zu der zweeter offizieller Compétitioun zu Lëtzebuerg! Wann dëst deng éischt Compétitioun ass, da fënns du am Tab "Newcomer Informations" nëtzlech Informatiounen.
Et kascht näischt matzemaachen, mee wanns du wëlls, kanns du gären eng Spend maachen. Dës Suen ginn agesat fir weider Compétitionen zu Lëtzebuerg ze organiséieren! Nëmmen wanns du dech online registréiers ass ett gratis. Wanns du dech um Event selwer umells, kascht ett dëch 1€.

The competition also counts as the national championship for Moldova.
So the best competitors from Moldova will be the national champions 2019 of Moldova.

items.name: Zagreb Cube Day 2019

venue.name: [Prva Gimnazija Zagreb](https://www.prva.hr/)
venue.details: Competition will be held in the main hall. / Natjecanje će biti održano u glavnoj prostoriji škole.

items.information:
(HR)

Zagreb Cube Day 2019 je dvanaesto natjecanje po redu koje se održava u Hrvatskoj od 2011. godine. Bilo tko može sudjelovati, bez obzira na nacionalnost i
starost, no svatko mora biti upoznat s WCA Pravilnikom.

Natjecanje je pod organizacijom Udruge Speedcubing Hrvatska. Kotizacija pokriva trošak organizacije i najma prostora. Mogući višak kotizacije ide u svrhu razvitka Udruge Speedcubing Hrvatska.

--------------

(EN)

Zagreb Cube Day 2019 is the 12th speedcubing competition being held in Croatia since 2011. Anyone can participate, no matter which nationality or age they are, but they need to be familiar with the WCA Regulations.

This competition is being organized by the Speedcubing Association Croatia. Registration fee covers the cost of the organization and venue rental. Any extra money goes directly to support Speedcubing Association Croatia.

VCP Otoño 2019 será la segunda competencia realizada en la Provincia de Córdoba, Argentina. Constará de dos días y se podrá competir en trece categorías distintas.

Serbian Open 2019 is a speedcubing competition. Anyone can participate, no matter which nationality or age they are, but they need to be familiar with the WCA Regulations. This competition is also recognized as a Serbian National Championship.

Musobaqada har qanday ishtirokchi qatnasha oladi, sovg'alar faqat O'zbekiston fuqarolari uchun beriladi.

items.name: Wellington Winter 2018

venue.name: [ASB Sports Centre](http://wellington.govt.nz/recreation/get-active-indoors/asb-sports-centre)
venue.address: 72 Kemp St, Kilbirnie, Wellington 6022, New Zealand

items.information: Wellington Winter 2018 is an official World Cube Association (WCA) sanctioned speedcubing competition. Speedcubing is solving the Rubik's Cube or other similar puzzles as quickly as possible. The competition is open to all competitors regardless of experience and skill, but certain event-based time limits will be in place so as to make sure we can stay on schedule and get through the day on time. No prior experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors should be familiar with the WCA regulations.

items.name: Semey Open 2018
items.information:
Dear competitors and guests!

1. The official opening ceremony will be held on June 7, 2018 at 7 pm. According to our idea, it will be held at the main square of the city. For the ceremony we will prepare a special show with the famous speedcubers. In this regard, we recommend arriving in the city no later than 12.00 hours on June 7.

2. The base fee allows to compete in 2x2x2 Cube, 3x3x3 Cube, Skewb, Pyraminx and Clock. For any other event you will need to pay additionally 1000 KZT per event.

3. The winner of each event will receive a prize!

===========

Барлық қатысушылар мен қонақтардың назарына !!!
1. Ресми ашылу 2018 жылдың 7 маусымында сағат 19.00-де өтеді, қаланың орталық алаңында өтеді. Салтанатты ашылу рәсімі үшін атақты спидкуберлер қатысуымен шоу-бағдарлама дайындалады. Осыған байланысты біз 7-маусымда сағат 12.00-ден кешіктірмей қалаға келуді ұсынамыз.

2. Негізгі сыйақы 2x2x2 куб, 3x3x3 куб, Skewb, Pyraminx және Clock бойынша бәсекелесуге мүмкіндік береді. Кез-келген басқа іс-шараға қосымша бір оқиға үшін 1000 теңге төлеуге тура келеді.

3. Әр жарыстың жеңімпазы жүлде алады.

===========

Дополнительная информация:

Внимание всем участникам и гостям!!!

1. Официальная церемония открытия, состоится 7 июня 2018 года в 19.00 ч. По нашей задумке она будет проходить на главной площади города. Для церемонии будет подготовлена специальная шоу программа с участием именитых спидкуберов. В связи с этим рекомендуем прибыть в город не позднее 12.00 часов 7 июня.

2. Регистрационный взнос позволяет принять участие в дисциплинах: 2х2, Rubik's Cube, Skweb, Piraminx, Clock. Для участия в других дисциплинах необходимо оплатить  дополнительный взнос по 1000 тенге за каждую дисциплину.  

3. За первое место во всех дисциплинах предусмотрены призы
